title: ASR Outdoor HRC Steel Shovel Spade Gold Panning Tool Knurled Wooden Handle 28.25
description:
Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just dipping your feet into this fun outdoor hobby, you need a sturdy and reliable shovel. The ASR Outdoor gold panning shovel is an ideal tool for digging and scooping while hunting for precious gems and metals. Use it in conjunction with your metal detector to dig where your tool detects potential treasures in sand, dirt and rocky areas. This shovel features a round shovel head made of durable, high-quality 45 HRC hardened steel that will stand the test of time. You can count on this quality shovel to get the job done whether you’re panning in the sunshine or during inclement weather. The blade measures 6” x 8.25”

ASR Outdoor HRC Steel Shovel Spade Gold Panning Tool Knurled Wooden Handle 28.25

Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just dipping your feet into this fun outdoor hobby, you need a sturdy and reliable shovel. The ASR Outdoor gold panning shovel is an ideal tool for digging and scooping while hunting for precious gems and metals. Use it in conjunction with your metal detector to dig where your tool detects potential treasures in sand, dirt and rocky areas.

Key Features

  • GOLD PANNING SHOVEL - ASR Outdoor steel shovel is an ideal tool for digging and scooping while gold prospecting for precious gems and treasures; Use it in conjunction with a metal detector to dig where your tool detects metal in sand, dirt and rocky areas
  • HARD STEEL CONSTRUCTION - Round shovel head is made of durable, high-quality 45 HRC steel that will stand up to the test of time; Count on this shovel to do the job during both ideal and inclement weather; Blade dimensions: 6” x 8.25”
  • KNURLED HANDLE - Gold prospecting shovel features a knurled wooden D-handle to provide extra grip and stability while digging; Overall length of shovel is 28.25”, ideal size for providing strength but is also easy to travel with
  • VERSATILE TOOL - Although designed for gold panning and prospecting, the ASR Outdoor shovel is also great for gardening, removing weeds, and digging holes while camping; Great multi-use outdoor adventure tool
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Overall length: 28.25”; Blade dimensions: 6” x 8.25”; Shovel head type: round; Steel type: 45 HRC hardness; Handle type: D-handle, knurled, wooden; Colors: brown, black

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GPSHV45
  • UPC: 810131703332
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 28.25 in

This shovel features a round shovel head made of durable, high-quality 45 HRC hardened steel that will stand the test of time. You can count on this quality shovel to get the job done whether you’re panning in the sunshine or during inclement weather. The blade measures 6” x 8.25”.

Our gold prospecting shovel features a knurled wooden D-shaped handle to provide extra grip and stability while digging and can help prevent slippage. The overall length of the shovel is 28.25”, making it a great size for providing significant strength while also being easy to travel with.

Although this shovel was originally designed for gold panning, it’s a great versatile tool for other outdoor activities like gardening, removing weeds and digging holes while camping. Overall, this is a must-have gold prospecting and outdoor adventure tool!
